Interface SchemaValidator

All Known Implementing Classes:
AvroSchemaValidator
public interface SchemaValidator
Author:
Vinicius Carvalho, Christian Tzolov Provides utility methods to validate, check compatibility and match schemas of different implementations

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Compatibility
    compatibilityCheck(String source, String other)
    Checks for compatibility between two schemas @see Compatibility class for types This method may not be supported for certain formats.
    String
    getFormat()
     
    boolean
    isValid(String definition)
    Verifies if a definition is a valid schema.
    Schema
    match(List<Schema> schemas, String definition)
    Return the Schema that is represented by the definition.
    default void
    validate(String definition)
    Validates a schema definition and throws an InvalidSchemaException when the schema is invalid.

  • Method Details

    • isValid

      boolean isValid(String definition)
      Verifies if a definition is a valid schema.
      Parameters:
      definition - - The textual representation of the schema file
      Returns:
      true if valid, false otherwise

    • validate

      default void validate(String definition)
      Validates a schema definition and throws an InvalidSchemaException when the schema is invalid. The exception is expected to have the violation description.
      Parameters:
      definition - - The textual representation of the schema file

    • compatibilityCheck

      Compatibility compatibilityCheck(String source, String other)
      Checks for compatibility between two schemas @see Compatibility class for types This method may not be supported for certain formats.
      Parameters:
      source - - The textual representation of the schema to tested
      other - - The textual representation of the other schema to tested
      Returns:
      Compatibility

    • match

      Schema match(List<Schema> schemas, String definition)
      Return the Schema that is represented by the definition.
      Parameters:
      schemas - List of schemas to be tested
      definition - Textual representation of the schema
      Returns:
      A full Schema object with identifier and subject properties

    • getFormat

      String getFormat()
